## Plan — GROVE-S03-T07: `grove doctor`

### Summary

The revised plan resolves both blockers identified in the plan review:

**Blocker 1 — Harness constant ownership (fixed)**

A new `core/src/harness.rs` module becomes the **single source of truth** for all harness-shape knowledge:
- `GROVE_START` / `GROVE_END` sentinel constants (previously private in `cli/src/init.rs`)
- `MCP_SERVER_KEY` (previously private in `cli/src/init.rs`)
- `expected_mcp_args(Mode) -> Option<&'static [&'static str]>` — maps mode to expected `.mcp.json` args
- `expected_claude_marker(Mode) -> Option<&'static str>` — maps mode to expected CLAUDE.md content marker
- `agents_md_expected(Mode) -> bool` — whether AGENTS.md requires a grove block

`cli/src/init.rs` imports from `grove_core::harness` instead of defining its own consts. `core::doctor` uses the same functions to check drift — no duplication, no circular dependency.

**Blocker 2 — Unit test strategy (fixed)**

Tests in `core/src/doctor.rs` write all fixtures by hand (`tempdir` + `std::fs::write`) then call `diagnose`. No references to private `reconcile_harness` or `seed_lock` helpers from the cli crate.

### Files to Modify

| File | Change |
|---|---|
| `core/src/harness.rs` | **New** — sentinel constants + per-mode query functions |
| `core/src/lib.rs` | Add `pub mod harness;` + `pub mod doctor;` |
| `core/src/doctor.rs` | **New** — `diagnose`, types, universal + explore checks |
| `cli/src/init.rs` | Replace 3 private consts with `grove_core::harness` imports |
| `cli/src/main.rs` | Add `Cmd::Doctor` variant + dispatch arm |
